meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Accelerate AI App Development
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your development. Learn to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to speed up your AI project workflow.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from feature creep and lack of focus. By implementing a structured user onboarding flow, you force clarity on your core value proposition. Using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can automate user guidance, drastically reducing development friction and time-to-market for your projects.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the enemy of every aspiring developer. You start with a vision, but within hours, you are drowning in boilerplate code, struggling to connect your database to your UI, and losing momentum. This 'developer's paralysis' is the silent killer of great student projects. It’s not a lack of talent; it’s a lack of process.

To move from student to professional, you must master the art of the 'Fast Path.' By focusing on high-impact user onboarding, you define your app's core journey before writing a single line of unnecessary logic. With Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding and Claude Code’s intelligent iteration, we will turn your development speed from a bottleneck into your greatest competitive advantage.

steps.title: Define the Value Milestone
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment. Before coding, map the path from sign-up to the first core action using an onboarding flow that minimizes cognitive load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a user onboarding flow that tracks progress through three key milestones: profile setup, initial data input, and first AI result generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate a React component for a multi-step onboarding wizard based on the Antigravity schema.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding State
steps.description: Create a robust state machine to manage user progress, ensuring that users can resume onboarding if they exit mid-flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state management hook for a multi-step onboarding process, including persistence to local storage and error handling for incomplete steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --content 'Implement persistence logic using localStorage.'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Use UI cues to guide users through complex AI features, turning a steep learning curve into a guided experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a reusable Tooltip component that attaches to any DOM element and triggers based on the onboarding state provided by the useOnboarding hook.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/components/Tooltip.tsx --instruction 'Ensure the tooltip only shows if the user has not completed the specific onboarding step.'

steps.title: Integrate AI-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Tailor the onboarding experience by asking one key question that configures the app's behavior for the specific user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an onboarding input field that updates the user's profile settings, which then influences the initial prompt sent to the AI backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Connect the onboarding input field to the user settings API route.'

steps.title: Automate Success Metrics
steps.description: Implement tracking to see where users drop off, allowing you to optimize your onboarding flow based on actual behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a logging service that records completion rates for each step of the onboarding flow to an external analytics endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/utils/analytics.ts --content 'Add event tracking for onboarding step completion.'

pro_tips: Never build an onboarding sequence that lasts longer than 60 seconds; if it takes longer, your app is too complex.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates during onboarding to make the app feel instant, even if the backend is performing heavy AI tasks.
Always provide a 'Skip' button; forcing users through onboarding is the fastest way to lose them.
Treat your onboarding code as a separate module from your core app logic to keep your codebase clean and maintainable.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your onboarding flow before you finish the UI, ensuring the state logic is bulletproof.
resources: State Machine Patterns for React: https://react.dev/learn/managing-state
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is streamlined, deploy your app to Vercel and share the link in our discord to get feedback on your user flow.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn complex ideas into refined, user-friendly products. Don't let your code sit stagnant—apply these patterns to your current project and watch your development velocity explode. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
